div.p: Architecture: Parallel Columnar Storage (SoA - Structure of Arrays) Archetype: (EntityID, Position, Velocity)

ul.li: Entity ID: 32 bytes utilized (0x00-0x1F) for 8 entities per batch.
Position Data: 64 bytes total (0x00-0x3F). Perfect cache line alignment.
Velocity Data: 64 bytes total (0x00-0x3F). Perfect cache line alignment.
Prefetcher: High predictability. CPU prefetcher loads subsequent columns efficiently.
SIMD: 8x f32 elements (4 positions) fit into a single 256-bit AVX register.

div.p: Indices across all vectors are kept perfectly in sync via internal table management.

p.em: Alignment: All columns aligned to 64-byte boundaries.

div.p: Memory Growth Direction Low Address [Index 0] ➔ High Address [Index N] (Vectors reside in contiguous heap-allocated segments)
